name: Michael Scott Jr.
bio: Michael Scott Jr. is the incumbent 2nd District Commissioner, first appointed in 2024. He is seeking re-election to his first full 4-year term. He is challenged by Andre Smith, an activist and perennial candidate who also ran in this district in 2022.
prior_office: Cook County Commissioner District 2 (appointed 2024–present). Son of Michael Scott Sr., former Chicago Board of Education president.

jacket.source: Illinois State Board of Elections (not retrieved)
jacket.note: Campaign finance not retrieved; check ISBE
